mapper.select: SELECT ar.user_id, SUM(ar.overtime_hours) AS total_overtime_hours FROM attendance_records ar INNER JOIN users u ON u.user_id = ar.user_id WHERE ar.attendance_date >= (CAST(#{startDate} AS date) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tokyo') AND ar.attendance_date < ((CAST(#{endDate} AS date) + interval '1 day') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Tokyo') AND ar.is_deleted = false AND u.is_active = true AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND ar.user_id > #{afterUserId} GROUP BY ar.user_id HAVING SUM(ar.overtime_hours) >= #{limitHours} ORDER BY ar.user_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DISTINCT ON (plb.user_id) plb.user_id, plb.grant_date, plb.used_days FROM paid_leave_balance plb INNER JOIN users u ON u.user_id = plb.user_id WHERE plb.expiry_date >= #{currentDate} AND #{currentDate} >= (plb.grant_date + interval '1 month' * #{monthsPassed}) AND plb.used_days < #{daysLimit} AND u.is_active = true AND u.deleted_at IS NULL AND plb.user_id > #{afterUserId} ORDER BY plb.user_id ASC, plb.grant_date ASC, plb.balance_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
